tg.tg_note: lone degenerate-kink fit far below exp; not a real low-Tg result. PMMA raw Tg STRADDLES exp (340-408 K across replicates); scattered, not a clean systematic.

density.density_note: FAIL -6.2% vs exp 1.19. ANOMALOUS: ~4% below the class's own PCFF benchmark (Tang2022 within 2%), systematic across all 4 replicates. Cells ARE equilibrated (plateau converged, drift<0.2%, sem<0.03%) -> NOT under-equilibration; a build/cell-quality concern (charges/tacticity/DP). Low density + high K is physically incoherent -> lowers confidence across the whole PMMA set.

bulk_modulus.method_note: deform-only (no Murnaghan); VALID fit (iso 8.47%, G=1.06, nu=0.36) but LOW outlier 3.39 vs Murnaghan replicates -- deform underestimates K here. No property passes cleanly for PMMA (weakest/lowest-confidence set).

provenance.review_note: PMMA replicate cross-check 2026-06-28: WEAKEST set, no property passes cleanly. Density FAIL x4 anomalous (-6%, below PCFF benchmark -> build/cell-quality concern). Tg scattered straddle (PMMA3 PASS is fast-rate coincidence). K FAIL-high vs K_T (K_T/K_S gap). PMMA2 468-style false slope-gate killed; PMMA1 degenerate.

orchestrator_reconciliation.note: Status labels use MW/condition-adjusted exp ranges. Versus CANONICAL high-MW PMMA targets (polymer_rules.json: Tg=378 K, K=[3.5-5.0] GPa, density=[1.145-1.265]), the simulated values are systematically SOFT: density -7.4%, Tg -10% (340 vs 378), K just below 3.5. This is internally coherent: PCFF underbinds PMMA, compounded by DP=40 finite-MW depression (Fox effect lowers Tg/density for short chains). Against MW-adjusted ranges (Tg [326-366], used here) Tg=340 is in-range.

bulk_modulus.assessment: two independent methods agree at 3.4-3.7 GPa; borderline at/just-below canonical exp lower bound 3.5

orchestrator_reconciliation.headline_verdict: All 3 properties systematically SOFT ~7-10% vs canonical PMMA (PCFF underbinds + DP=40 finite-MW). density -7.4%, Tg -10.1%, K -3% below lower bound / -20% vs mid. Right ballpark, none cleanly in-range. Internally coherent.
orchestrator_reconciliation.range_corrections: Fixed two spurious exp ranges: Tg [326-366]->[358-398] (gen_prompt _exp_tg_range averages all class polymers - BUG); K [3.0-4.2]->[3.5-5.0] (worker hallucination).
